The '''Marauder battle armor''', also known as '''Marauder armor''', was a type of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] created by the [[Sanyassan Marauders]] from the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]].<ref name="SWG" /> It offered protection against kinetic damage as well as from energy-based weapons like [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]].<ref name="SWG:CU" /> This armor was usually made up of any available moldable materials that may have some protective traits. Hence, its effectiveness could vary greatly, depending on the type of materials used and the skills of the [[armorsmith]]. A typical complete armor set comprised helmet, breastplate, left and right biceps, left and right bracers, gloves, leggings and boots. It was available in several different colors.<ref name="SWG" /> Two other models of Marauder armors also existed: the [[Marauder Assault Armor|Marauder assault armor]] and the [[Marauder Reconnaissance Armor|Marauder recon armor]].<ref name="SWG:GU5">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other|Game Update 5}}</ref> In addition to the Sanyassan Marauders on Endor, Marauder armors were worn by [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG" />

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[King/Legends|King]] [[Terak]] offered a Marauder armor to a spacer who had achieved several missions for him and the Sanyassan Marauders.<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Marauder armor appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Marauder armor became the Marauder battle armor when the armor was adapted to the new armor system of the "[[W:c:swg:Combat Upgrade|Combat Upgrade]],"<ref name="SonyCite-Combat Upgrade: Armor System">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Combat%20Upgrade:%20Armor%20System|text=Combat Upgrade: Armor System}}</ref> released on [[April 27]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
